member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment.#ctor
member.summary: ctor for DI, use for creating a custom environment

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment.GetEnvironmentByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the Bitstamp environment by name

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampExchange.FormatSymbol(System.String,System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.TradingMode,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Format a base and quote asset to a CoinEx recognized symbol

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampExchange.SymbolToPathParameter(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a symbol name to a symbol accepted by the exchange in various endpoints by removing the `/` and converting to lower case

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampExchange.RateLimiter
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Bitstamp API

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampRateLimiters
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Bitstamp API

member.name: E:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampRateLimiters.RateLimitTriggered
member.summary: Event for when a rate limit is triggered

member.name: E:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampRateLimiters.RateLimitUpdated
member.summary: Event when the rate limit is updated. Note that it's only updated when a request is send, so there are no specific updates when the current usage is decaying.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.BitstampTrackerFactory.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.param: Service provider for resolving logging and clients

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampRestClient.#ctor(System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampRestOptions})
member.summary: Create a new instance of the BitstampRestClient using provided options

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampRestClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampRestOptions})
member.summary: Create a new instance of the BitstampRestClient

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampRestClient.SetDefaultOptions(System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampRestOptions})
member.summary: Set the default options to be used when creating new clients

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampSocketClient.#ctor(System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampSocketOptions})
member.summary: Create a new instance of the BitstampSocketClient

member.summary: Create a new instance of the BitstampSocketClient

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampSocketClient.SetDefaultOptions(System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampSocketOptions})
member.summary: Set the default options to be used when creating new clients

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.BitstampUserClientProvider.#ctor(System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOptions})
member.param: Options to use for created clients

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Clients.ExchangeApi.BitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampSocketOptions,Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Sockets.BitstampSocketKeyGenerator)
member.summary: Create a new instance of BitstampSocketClient with default options

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Converters.BitstampSourceGenerationContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions

member.name: F:Bitstamp.Net.Enums.SocketEventType.Data
member.summary: Data was received for an active subscription

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApi.Account
member.summary: Endpoints related to account settings, info or actions

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApi.ExchangeData
member.summary: Endpoints related to retrieving market and system data

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApi.Trading
member.summary: Endpoints related to orders and trades

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApi.SharedClient
member.summary: Get the shared rest requests client. This interface is shared with other exchanges to allow for a common implementation for different exchanges.

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount
member.summary: Bitstamp account endpoints. Account endpoints include balance info, withdraw/deposit info and requesting and account settings

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetAccountBalancesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get user account balances
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/account_balances/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetAccountBalanceAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get user account balance
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/account_balances/{asset}/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetWithdrawFeesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get withdraw fees
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/fees/withdrawal/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetWithdrawFeesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get withdraw fees
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/fees/withdrawal/{asset}/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetAllFeesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get trading fees
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/fees/trading/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetFeesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get trading fees for a symbol
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/fees/trading/{symbol}/

Get user transaction history
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/user_transactions/
member.param: Limit result to that many transactions (default: 100; maximum: 1000).

member.summary:
Get user transaction history for a symbol
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/user_transactions/{symbol}/
member.param: Limit result to that many transactions (default: 100; maximum: 1000).

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetSymbolsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get symbols tradable for the user
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/my_markets/

Get max tradable quantity for the parameters
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/get_max_order_amount/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetWithdrawalsAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Max age in number of seconds to return

member.summary:
Withdraw fiat to a bank account
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/withdrawal/open/
member.param: The asset to withdraw, for example `USD`
Bank postal code for international withdrawal
The currency in which the funds should be withdrawn

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.CancelWithdrawalAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Cancel an in progress withdrawal
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/withdrawal/cancel/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.GetFiatWithdrawalStatusAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get fiat withdrawal status
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/withdrawal/status/

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiAccount.WithdrawCryptoAsync(System.String,System.Decimal,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Withdraw crypto. Only non-thirdparty withdrawals supported atm
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/{asset}_withdrawal/
member.param: If the address you are withdrawing to is in your name (regardless of if this is a hosted or unhosted wallet), this should be set to False. If you are withdrawing to a third party, set it to True.

Endpoint:

Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/crypto-transactions/

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampRestClientExchangeApiTrading
member.summary: Bitstamp trading endpoints, placing and managing orders.

Place a new limit order
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/buy/{symbol}/
POST /api/v2/sell/{symbol}/
member.param: Whether to cancel order at end of the day

member.summary:
Place a new market order
Docs:
Endpoint:
POST /api/v2/buy/market/{symbol}/
POST /api/v2/sell/market/{symbol}/

Endpoint:

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi
member.summary: Websocket subscriptions for the Bitstamp API

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SharedClient
member.summary: Get the shared socket subscription client. This interface is shared with other exchanges to allow for a common implementation for different exchanges.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampTradeUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToFullOrderBookUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampOrderBookUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to order book diff updates
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToFundingRateUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampFundingRateUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToOrderBookSnapshotUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampOrderBookUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToOrderUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampOrderUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToUserTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampUserTradeUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeApi.IBitstampSocketClientExchangeApiShared
member.summary: Get the shared socket subscription client. This interface is shared with other exchanges to allow for a common implementation for different exchanges.

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampRestClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Bitstamp API.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampRestClient.SetOptions(CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Options.UpdateOptions)
member.param: Options to update. Only specific options are changeable after the client has been created

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampRestClient.SetApiCredentials(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials)
member.summary: Set the API credentials for this client. All Api clients in this client will use the new credentials, regardless of earlier set options.

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampSocketClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Bitstamp websocket API

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampSocketClient.SetOptions(CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Options.UpdateOptions)
member.param: Options to update. Only specific options are changeable after the client has been created

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampSocketClient.SetApiCredentials(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials)
member.summary: Set the API credentials for this client. All Api clients in this client will use the new credentials, regardless of earlier set options.

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampUserClientProvider
member.summary: Provider for clients with credentials for specific users

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampUserClientProvider.InitializeUserClient(System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials,Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment)
member.summary: Initialize a client for the specified user identifier. This can be used so to initialize a client for a user so ApiCredentials do not need to be passed later.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampUserClientProvider.ClearUserClients(System.String)
member.summary: Reset the cached clients for a user. This can be useful when a user changes API credentials.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampUserClientProvider.GetRestClient(System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials,Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Rest client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampUserClientProvider.GetSocketClient(System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials,Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Socket client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.IBitstampOrderBookFactory.Create(CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.SharedSymbol,System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions})
member.summary: Create a SymbolOrderBook for the symbol

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.IBitstampOrderBookFactory.Create(System.String,System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions})
member.summary: Create a SymbolOrderBook for the API

member.summary: Create a new Spot user data tracker

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.IBitstampTrackerFactory.CreateUserSpotDataTracker(CryptoExchange.Net.Trackers.UserData.Objects.SpotUserDataTrackerConfig)
member.summary: Create a new spot user data tracker

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.IBitstampTrackerFactory.CreateUserFuturesDataTracker(System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.ApiCredentials,CryptoExchange.Net.Trackers.UserData.Objects.FuturesUserDataTrackerConfig,Bitstamp.Net.BitstampEnvironment)
member.summary: Create a new Futures user data tracker

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.IBitstampTrackerFactory.CreateUserFuturesDataTracker(CryptoExchange.Net.Trackers.UserData.Objects.FuturesUserDataTrackerConfig)
member.summary: Create a new Futures user data tracker

member.name: T:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.BitstampApiAddresses
member.summary: Api addresses usable for the Bitstamp clients

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.BitstampApiAddresses.RestClientAddress
member.summary: The address used by the BitstampRestClient for the rest API

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.BitstampApiAddresses.SocketClientAddress
member.summary: The address used by the BitstampSocketClient for the socket API

member.name: F:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.BitstampApiAddresses.Default
member.summary: The default addresses to connect to the Bitstamp.com API

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampMarginTier.CloseOutMarginPreviousLevelMax
member.summary: Close out margin previous level max

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampMaxTradeQuantity.MaxOrderQuantityAsset
member.summary: Asset the max quantity is in

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampMaxTradeQuantity.MaxOrderValueAsset
member.summary: Asset the max value is in

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampSymbol.InstantOrderCounterDecimals
member.summary: Instant buy/sell quote asset decimal places

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampSymbol.InstantAndMarketOrderStatus
member.summary: Status of whether instance/market orders are allowanced

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampSymbol.Isin
member.summary: International Securities Identification Number for derivatives

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.BitstampTicker.Vwap
member.summary: Last hour volume weighted average price

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampOrderUpdate.AccountId
member.summary: ID of related trade account (0 for main account, Unique ID for sub accounts).

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitstampUserTradeUpdate.AccountId
member.summary: ID of related trade account (0 for main account, Unique ID for sub accounts).

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options for the Bitstamp SymbolOrderBook

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions.InitialDataTimeout
member.summary: After how much time we should consider the connection dropped if no data is received for this time after the initial subscriptions

member.name: P:Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampSocketApiOptions.PingInterval
member.summary: Interval to send ping message to server

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.SymbolOrderBooks.BitstampOrderBookFactory.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.param: Service provider for resolving logging and clients

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.SymbolOrderBooks.BitstampSymbolOrderBook.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions})
member.summary: Create a new order book instance
member.param: The symbol the order book is for

member.name: M:Bitstamp.Net.SymbolOrderBooks.BitstampSymbolOrderBook.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOrderBookOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampRestClient,Bitstamp.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitstampSocketClient)
member.summary: Create a new order book instance
member.param: The symbol the order book is for

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBitstamp(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Add services such as the IBitstampRestClient and IBitstampSocketClient. Configures the services based on the provided configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBitstamp(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Bitstamp.Net.Objects.Options.BitstampOptions})
member.summary: Add services such as the IBitstampRestClient and IBitstampSocketClient. Services will be configured based on the provided options.
member.param: Set options for the Bitstamp services

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_BitstampOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
